children.text: The Secretary shall review the number of such awards made in the 12-month period beginning on .December 22, 1987
At the end of each 3-month period beginning after the expiration of the 12-month period referred to in paragraph (1) the Secretary shall review the number of such awards made in the 3-month period.

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary shall notify the Congress of such determination, and

children.label: B
children.text: beginning 180 days after the receipt by Congress of a notification under paragraph (1), no petition for a vaccine-related injury or death associated with the administration of a vaccine on or after , may be filed under .December 22, 1987section 300aa–11 of this title
